881 THGHT_BETTER_DD_CD THGHT_BETTER_DD_CD D0150I1 Mood: Thoughts of better off dead: Pres CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident, over the past two weeks, has had thoughts that you would be better off dead, or of hurting yourself in some way. 0=No
